patterns.title: Use a file-backed local DB fallback, not split in-memory state
symptoms: Project creation succeeds but the project detail page 404s immediately after redirect.
API endpoints can see data that the page route cannot.
patterns.rule: When Turso is unavailable, resolve a concrete repo-local SQLite path and create parent directories before opening the client.
evidence: This fixed the split-state 404 during project creation testing in recruiterstack.

patterns.title: Auto-increment duplicate project slugs
symptoms: Repeated tests or repeated idea names fail with SQLITE_CONSTRAINT on projects.slug.
The plan page appears stuck after clicking Solve This With Me.
patterns.rule: Check for an existing slug before insert and suffix duplicates with -2, -3, and so on.
evidence: This fixed repeated funnel testing for AI Resume Screener in recruiterstack.

patterns.title: Re-snapshot after navigation during browser verification
symptoms: Playwright or browser harness clicks a stale element ref after route changes.
A later click appears to target the wrong tab or wrong page.
patterns.rule: Always capture a fresh snapshot after page navigation before using element references again.
evidence: This prevented false negatives during funnel walkthrough testing.
